query_filters.expression: EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM Clarity.dbo.REFERRAL_HIST AS RFLH WHERE RFLH.REFERRAL_ID = RFL.Referralid AND RFLH.NEW_RFL_STATUS_C = 5 /* Denied */ UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM Clarity.dbo.REFERRAL_BED_DAY AS RFLBD WHERE RFL.Referralid = RFLBD.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLBD.BED_DAY_STATUS_C = 2 /* Denied */)
EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM CookClarity.Reporting.V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequestStatusHistory_Fact AS aughx WHERE aughx.AUTH_REQUEST_ID = aug.AUTH_REQUEST_ID AND aughx.UM_STATUS_C = 5 /* Denied */)

RFLHIC.REFERRAL_ID = RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHIC.GROUP_LINE = RFLHA.GROUP_LINE AND RFLHIC.VALUE_LINE = RFLHA.VALUE_LINE AND RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE IN (50 /* Referral Status */, 18007 /* Denial Reason */, 18003 /* Pending Reason */, 2081 /* Bed Day Status */, 2080 /* Bed Day Denied Reason */)

RFLHNV.REFERRAL_ID = RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHNV.GROUP_LINE = RFLHA.GROUP_LINE AND RFLHNV.VALUE_LINE = RFLHA.VALUE_LINE AND ((RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 18007 AND NOT RFLHNV.NEW_VAL IS NULL) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 18003 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = 1640000010 /* Request for Information */) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 50 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = '5' /* Denied */) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 2081 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = '2' /* Denied */) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 2080 AND NOT RFLHNV.NEW_VAL IS NULL))
authx.UM_STATUS = 'Denied' OR (authx.UM_STATUS = 'Pending Review' AND authx.UM_PENDING_RSN = 'HP Request for Information')

query_filters_english: there exists a row where either (from REFERRAL_HIST, where New Rfl Status C = 5) or (from REFERRAL_BED_DAY, where Bed Day Status C = 2)
there exists a row where from V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequestStatusHistory_Fact, where Um Status C = 5

Item Change = 18007 and New Val is not null or Item Change = 18003 and New Val = 1640000010 or Item Change = 50 and New Val = '5' or Item Change = 2081 and New Val = '2' or Item Change = 2080 and New Val is not null
Um Status = 'Denied' or Um Status = 'Pending Review' and Um Pending Rsn = 'HP Request for Information'

technical_definition.resolved_expression: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY aut.UM_AUTH_REQUEST_ID ORDER BY CASE WHEN authx.UM_STATUS = 'Denied' THEN authx.CHANGED_DTTM ELSE '99991231' END)

transformation_chain.name: DENIAL_ROW
transformation_chain.expression: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY aut.UM_AUTH_REQUEST_ID ORDER BY CASE WHEN authx.UM_STATUS = 'Denied' THEN authx.CHANGED_DTTM ELSE '99991231' END) AS "DENIAL_ROW"

columns.english_definition: row number, for same Um Authorization Request Identifier, ordered by Categorization: when Um Status = 'Denied', Changed Date/Time; otherwise '99991231'

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN authx.UM_STATUS = 'Denied' THEN authx.CHANGED_DTTM ELSE NULL END

transformation_chain.name: DENIAL_DATE
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN authx.UM_STATUS = 'Denied' THEN authx.CHANGED_DTTM ELSE NULL END AS "DENIAL_DATE"

columns.english_definition_with_filters: row number, for same Um Authorization Request Identifier, ordered by Categorization: when Um Pending Rsn = 'HP Request for Information', Changed Date/Time; otherwise '99991231' (filtered where: 0 = 0; there exists a row where either (from REFERRAL_HIST, where New Rfl Status C = 5) or (from REFERRAL_BED_DAY, where Bed Day Status C = 2); there exists a row where from V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequestStatusHistory_Fact, where Um Status C = 5; Item Change in (50, 18007, 18003, 2081, 2080); Item Change = 18007 and New Val is not null or Item Change = 18003 and New Val = 1640000010 or Item Change = 50 and New Val = '5' or Item Change = 2081 and New Val = '2' or Item Change = 2080 and New Val is not null; Um Status = 'Denied' or Um Status = 'Pending Review' and Um Pending Rsn = 'HP Request for Information')
